projectDescription: A digital forensics tool that traces viral social media posts back to their definitive source, calculating a Postcard Score to measure content drift from ground truth.
keyFeatures: 4-stage forensic pipeline: ingest, audit, corroborate, verify
Postcard Score (0–100%) measuring content drift from ground truth
AI-powered corroboration engine using Google Gemini with search grounding
Live content ingestion via platform-specific strategies (X, Reddit, YouTube, Instagram)
Playwright-based origin reachability and temporal alignment auditing
Real-time progress polling with SSE-like status updates
Dynamic Open Graph image generation for forensic report sharing
Result caching with Turso/libSQL via Drizzle ORM
Fake mode for development and demos without API keys
OpenAPI v3.1 specification for SDK generation
publicApiSurface: POST /api/postcards — Submit a URL for forensic verification
GET /api/postcards?url= — Poll for postcard status and retrieve completed report
GET /api/postcards/[id]/og — Generate dynamic Open Graph PNG image
